It is with sadness that I announce the closure of my collection 😢.
Running a business and being a mother is a real challenge. For the past few months, I've been trying to reconcile work, family
and tireless efforts with our loved ones, but there simply aren't enough hours in the day.

🌎 So I made the difficult decision to close our boutique so that I could devote more time to my daughters and allow them to grow and develop.
allow them to grow up and have a positive impact on this wonderful world
Here are some valuable lessons I've learned from this experience:

⏱️ Business never stops: for a while, it was exciting to interact with customers
virtually every hour of the day, but soon the constant pace began to take its toll
on our precious family time.

💲 Business costs rose rapidly: inventory, packaging materials, shipping costs
and other expenses are piling up faster than expected.

💖 It requires total dedication: while I thought my career as a lawyer was challenging, the day-to-day running of a business is a task not to be underestimated. And frankly, it exhausts me not to be able to cope with my responsibilities at home.
